tasks.label: Have Wizard Cromperty teleport you to the Rune Essence mine.
Steal a cake from the Ardougne market stalls.
Sell Silk to Silk trader in Ardougne for 60 coins each.
Use the altar in East Ardougne's church.
Go out fishing on the Fishing Trawler
Enter the Combat Training Camp north of W. Ardougne.
Have Tindel Marchant identify a Rusted Sword for you.
Use the Ardougne Lever to teleport to the Wilderness.
View Aleck's Hunter Emporium in Yanille.
Check what pets you have Insured with Probita in Ardougne.
Enter the Unicorn pen in Ardougne zoo using Fairy rings.
requirements: Quest Started Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
Dramen or Lunar staff to travel to Fairy ring code .

tasks.label: Grapple over Yanille's south wall.
Harvest some strawberries from the Ardougne farming patch.
requirements: 3 strawberry seeds, spade, seed dibber (or Barbarian Farming), and a rake
Basket of apples recommended to pay the nearby farmer to protect the crop

tasks.label: Cast the Ardougne Teleport spell.
Travel to Castlewars by Hot Air Balloon.
requirements: If the route has not been unlocked yet, 11 total yew logs are required to unlock it before flying again to Castle Wars to complete this task. Upon unlocking the route, you may use 1 normal log to depart to Taverley before returning to Castle Wars for the task completion.

tasks.label: Claim buckets of sand from Bert in Yanille.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Hand in the Sand (unless playing as Ultimate Ironman)

tasks.label: Catch any fish on the Fishing Platform.
Pickpocket the master farmer north of Ardougne.
Collect some Nightshade from the Skavid Caves.
requirements: Any light source and the Skavid map

tasks.label: Kill a swordchick in the Tower of Life.
requirements: Quest Completion of Tower of Life

tasks.label: Equip Iban's upgraded staff or upgrade an Iban staff.
requirements: Iban's upgraded staff, or 200,000 coins and Iban's staff to have the Dark Mage in West Ardougne upgrade it

tasks.label: Visit the Island East of the Necromancer's tower.
requirements: Quest Started Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
Dramen or Lunar staff to travel to Fairy ring code

tasks.label: Recharge some Jewellery at the Totem in the Legends Guild.
requirements: Less than fully charged skills necklace or combat bracelet

tasks.label: Enter the Magic Guild.
Steal from a chest in Ardougne Castle.
Have a zookeeper put you in Ardougne Zoo's monkey cage.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of the Monkey Madness I quest

tasks.label: Teleport to the Watchtower.
requirements: Means to cast the Watchtower teleport ( )

tasks.label: Catch a Red Salamander.
Check the health of a Palm tree near tree gnome village.
requirements: Palm sapling, spade and a rake
15 Papaya fruit recommended to pay the gardener

tasks.label: Pick some Poison Ivy berries from the patch south of Ardougne.
requirements: Poison ivy seed, seed dibber (or Barbarian Farming), and a rake

tasks.label: Smith a Mithril platebody near Ardougne.
Enter your POH from Yanille.
requirements: 25,000 coins for an estate agent to move your house to Yanille

tasks.label: Smith a Dragon sq shield in West Ardougne.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Plague City
Shield left half, shield right half and a hammer

tasks.label: Craft some Death runes from Essence.
requirements: Quest Completion of Mourning's End Part II
Access to the Death Altar via the Abyss

tasks.label: Catch a Manta ray in the Fishing Trawler and cook it in Port Khazard.
requirements: Raw manta ray, multiple recommended in case of burning one

tasks.label: Picklock the door to the basement of Yanille Agility Dungeon.
Pickpocket a Hero.
Make a rune crossbow yourself from scratch within Witchaven or Yanille.
requirements: Yew logs, runite bar, hammer, knife, and sinew or a tree root

tasks.label: Imbue a Salve amulet at Nightmare Zone, or equip a Salve amulet that was imbued there.
requirements: Quest Completion of the Haunted Mine
Salve amulet(i) or Salve amulet(ei), or 800,000 Nightmare Zone points points to imbue the normal one (reduced to 400,000 points with the hard tier of the Combat Achievements completed)

tasks.label: Pick some Torstol from the patch north of Ardougne.
requirements: Torstol seed, seed dibber (or Barbarian Farming), and a rake

tasks.label: Complete a lap of Ardougne's rooftop agility course.
Cast Ice Barrage on another player within Castle Wars.
requirements: Quest Completion of Desert Treasure I
Means to cast Ice Barrage ( or a Blighted ancient ice sack for every cast)

tasks.label: Catch a Golden Warbler.
requirements: Necklace of passage recommended for quick access to Eagle's Eyrie, near the Uzer Hunter area

tasks.label: Mine 5 clay in the north-eastern desert.
requirements: Necklace of passage recommended for quick access to Eagle's Eyrie, near the Uzer mine

tasks.label: Enter the Kalphite Hive.
Enter the Desert with a set of Desert robes equipped.
requirements: Desert shirt, desert robe, and desert boots

tasks.label: Kill a Vulture
Have the Nardah Herbalist clean a Herb for you.
Collect 5 Potato Cactus from the Kalphite Hive.
requirements: Antipoison and food recommended if not bringing your own potato cactus

tasks.label: Sell some artefacts to Simon Templeton.
requirements: Players must have started Icthlarin's Little Helper for access to Sophanem.

tasks.label: Open the Sarcophagus in the first room of Pyramid Plunder
Cut a desert cactus open to fill a waterskin.
requirements: Knife or a slash weapon, and an empty waterskin

tasks.label: Travel from the Shantay Pass to Pollnivneach by Magic Carpet.
requirements: 200 coins and a Shantay Pass or another 5 coins.

tasks.label: Climb to the summit of the Agility Pyramid.
Slay a desert lizard.
Catch an Orange Salamander.
requirements: Rope and a small fishing net

tasks.label: Steal a feather from the Desert Phoenix.
Travel to Uzer via Magic Carpet.
requirements: 200 coins (or 205 coins if using the Shantay Pass)

tasks.label: Travel to the Desert via Eagle.
Pray at the Elidinis statuette in Nardah
requirements: Quest Completion of Spirits of the Elid

tasks.label: Create a combat potion in the desert.
requirements: Harralander potion (unf) and goat horn dust

tasks.label: Teleport to Enakhra's Temple with the Camulet.
Visit the Genie.
requirements: Quest Started Spirits of the Elid

tasks.label: Teleport to Pollnivneach with a redirected teleport to house tablet.
requirements: Scroll of redirection and a house tablet

tasks.label: Chop some Teak Logs near Uzer.
Knock out and pickpocket a Menaphite Thug.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of The Feud

tasks.label: Mine some Granite.
Refill your waterskins in the Desert using Lunar magic.
requirements: Waterskin that isn't full and means to cast Humidify ( )

tasks.label: Kill the Kalphite Queen.
Complete a lap of the Pollnivneach agility course.
Slay a Dust Devil in the desert cave with a Slayer helmet equipped.
requirements: Slayer helmet (requires Crafting 55 ) (and Quest completion of Cabin Fever for Ironman accounts)

tasks.label: Activate Ancient Magicks at the altar in the Jaldraocht Pyramid.
requirements: Quest Completion of Desert Treasure I

tasks.label: Defeat a Locust Rider with Keris.
requirements: Keris or Keris partisan, and any light source

tasks.label: Burn some yew logs on the Nardah Mayor's balcony.
Create a Mithril Platebody in Nardah.
Bake a wild pie at the Nardah Clay Oven.
Cast Ice Barrage against a foe in the Desert
requirements: Quest Completion of Desert Treasure I

tasks.label: Fletch some Dragon darts at the Bedabin Camp.
Speak to the KQ head in your POH.
requirements: Quest Completion of Priest in Peril
2 mahogany planks, 2 gold leaves, saw, and hammer
Kq head or Kq head (tattered), and 50,000 coins to have the taxidermist stuff it
Additional 15,000 coins to construct a Skill Hall if you haven't already

tasks.label: Steal from the Grand Gold Chest in the final room of Pyramid Plunder.
Restore at least 85 Prayer points when praying at the Altar in Sophanem.
Find out what your family crest is from Sir Renitee
Climb over the western Falador wall.
Browse Sarah's farm shop.
Get a Haircut or a Shave from the Falador Hairdresser.
Fill a bucket from the pump north of Falador west bank.
Kill a duck in Falador Park.
requirements: None, though using Magic or a Ranged weapon is recommended

tasks.label: Make a mind tiara.
Take the boat to Entrana.
requirements: Have no weapons or armour equipped or in your inventory

tasks.label: Repair a broken strut in the Motherlode Mine.
Claim a security book from the Security guard at Port Sarim jail.
Smith some Blurite Limbs on Doric's anvil.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Knight's Sword and Doric's Quest

tasks.label: Light a Bullseye lantern at the Chemist's in Rimmington.
requirements: Tinderbox and a regular bullseye lantern

tasks.label: Telegrab some Wine of Zamorak at the Chaos Temple by the Wilderness.
Unlock the Crystal chest in Taverley.
Place a Scarecrow in the Falador farm flower patch.
requirements: Farming 23 (Ironman accounts require Farming 47 or the ability to kill gryphons)
Bronze spear, watermelon, and a hay sack (you can fill an empty sack with hay at the hay bale in the chicken coop nearby.)

tasks.label: Kill a Mogre at Mudskipper Point.
requirements: Quest Completion of Skippy and the Mogres
It is not possible to skip having to complete Skippy and the Mogres, or needing a fishing explosive, by killing them through a boat cannon through the Sailing skill.

tasks.label: Visit the Port Sarim Rat Pits.
Grapple up and then jump off the north Falador wall.
Pickpocket a Falador guard.
Pray at the Altar of Guthix in Taverley whilst wearing full Initiate.
Mine some Gold ore at the Crafting Guild.
requirements: Any pickaxe and a brown apron, golden apron, or Crafting cape

tasks.label: Squeeze through the crevice in the Dwarven mines.
Chop and burn some Willow logs in Taverley.
Craft a fruit basket on the Falador Farm loom.
Teleport to Falador.
Craft 140 Mind runes simultaneously from Essence without the use of Extracts.
requirements: Runecraft 42 with 3+ Raiments of the Eye pieces
28 pure, daeyalt, or rune essence (less may suffice at higher Runecraft levels)
Access to the Mind Altar (mind talisman/tiara, catalytic talisman/tiara, or the Abyss)

tasks.label: Change your family crest to the Saradomin symbol.
requirements: 5,000 coins (an additional 5,000 coins if your randomised family crest already is Saradomin, to change to another and back)

tasks.label: Kill the Giant Mole beneath Falador Park.
Kill a Skeletal Wyvern in the Asgarnia Ice Dungeon.
requirements: Protection from the wyvern's icy breath and weaponry to slay it

tasks.label: Complete a lap of the Falador rooftop agility course.
Enter the mining guild while wearing a Prospector helmet.
requirements: Prospector helmet or golden prospector helmet

tasks.label: Kill the Blue Dragon under the Heroes' Guild.
requirements: Quest Completion of the Heroes' Quest
Protection from dragonfire and weaponry to slay it

tasks.label: Crack a wall safe within Rogues' Den.
Recharge your prayer in the Port Sarim church while wearing full Proselyte.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Slug Menace

tasks.label: Enter the Warriors' Guild.
requirements: 130 combined levels in Attack link=yes and Strength link=yes, or level 99 in either

tasks.label: Equip a dwarven helmet within the dwarven mines.
Craft 252 Air Runes simultaneously from Essence without the use of Extracts.
requirements: Runecraft 77 with 2 Raiments of the Eye pieces
Runecraft 66 with 3 Raiments of the Eye pieces
Runecraft 55 with 4 Raiments of the Eye pieces
28 pure, daeyalt, or rune essence (less may suffice at higher Runecraft levels)
Access to the Air Altar (air talisman/tiara, elemental talisman/tiara, or the Abyss)

tasks.label: Purchase a White 2h Sword from Sir Vyvin.
requirements: Rank of White Knight Master (requires a Black Knight kill score of 1300 - this rank automatically starts at White Knight Novice, with a kill score of 100)

tasks.label: Find at least 3 magic roots at once when digging up your magic tree in Falador.
requirements: Magic sapling, spade and any axe

tasks.label: Perform a skillcape or quest cape emote at the top of Falador Castle.
requirements: Completion of all quests or level 99 in any skill
Any Cape of Accomplishment (except for joke skillcapes or the Max cape)

tasks.label: Jump over the strange floor in Taverley dungeon.
Mix a Saradomin brew in Falador east bank.
Catch a Cerulean twitch.
Change your boots at Yrsa's Shoe Store.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Fremennik Trials

tasks.label: Kill 5 Rock crabs.
Craft a tiara from scratch in Rellekka.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Fremennik Trials
Any pickaxe (can be found north of the Rellekka mine) and a tiara mould

tasks.label: Browse the Stonemasons shop.
requirements: Dramen or Lunar staff recommended to travel to Fairy ring code for quick access to the city

tasks.label: Collect 5 Snape grass on Waterbirth Island.
requirements: Waterbirth teleport tablet to directly access the island, or either 1000 coins or quest completion of The Fremennik Trials to travel via Jarvald

tasks.label: Steal from the Keldagrim crafting or baker's stall.
Fill a bucket with water at the Rellekka well.

requirements: Any axe (can be found north of the Rellekka mine) and a tinderbox

tasks.label: Slay a Brine rat.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Olaf's Quest
Weaponry, and a spade to enter the Brine Rat Cavern

tasks.label: Travel to the Snowy Hunter Area via Eagle.
Mine some coal in Rellekka.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Fremennik Trials
Any pickaxe (can be found north of the Rellekka mine)

tasks.label: Steal from the Rellekka Fish stalls.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Fremennik Trials

tasks.label: Travel to Miscellania by Fairy ring.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Fremennik Trials and having started Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
Dramen or Lunar staff to travel to Fairy ring code

tasks.label: Catch a Snowy knight.
requirements: Hunter 35 with a butterfly net and jar

tasks.label: Pick up your Pet Rock from your POH Menagerie.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of The Fremennik Trials
30,000 coins, 4 oak planks, saw, and hammer to construct a menagerie with a pet house, if you haven't already

tasks.label: Visit the Lighthouse from Waterbirth island.
requirements: Quest Completion of Horror from the Deep
Food and Prayer 43 for protection prayers recommended
Way of getting past the two-man doors at the dungeon entrance (help from another player, pet rock and rune thrownaxes, or Agility 85 for the rock shortcut)

tasks.label: Mine some gold at the Arzinian mine.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Between a Rock...
Any pickaxe and the gold helmet

tasks.label: Teleport to Trollheim.
Catch a Sabre-toothed Kyatt.
requirements: Teasing stick, logs, and a knife

tasks.label: Mix a super defence potion in the Fremennik Province.
Steal from the Keldagrim Gem Stall.
Craft a Neitiznot shield on Neitiznot.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of The Fremennik Isles
Hammer, rope, a set of bronze nails, and 2 arctic pine logs.

tasks.label: Mine 5 Adamantite ores on Jatizso.
Obtain 100% support from your kingdom subjects.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Throne of Miscellania
Rake, pickaxe, axe, harpoon and/or lobster pot, depending on how you plan to gain support

tasks.label: Teleport to Waterbirth Island.
Obtain the Blast Furnace Foremans permission to use the Blast Furnace for free. ·
Kill each of the Dagannoth Kings.
requirements: Way of getting past the two-player doors at the dungeon entrance (help from another player, pet rock and rune thrownaxes, or Agility 85 for the rock shortcut)

tasks.label: Craft 56 astral runes simultaneously from Essence without the use of Extracts.
requirements: 28 pure or daeyalt essence (this task is not bypass-able with Raiments of the Eye)

tasks.label: Create a dragonstone amulet in the Neitiznot furnace.
requirements: Dragonstone, gold bar, and an amulet mould

tasks.label: Complete a lap of the Rellekka agility course.
Kill the generals of Armadyl, Bandos, Saradomin and Zamorak in the God Wars Dungeon.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of the Troll Stronghold, or completion of the Easy Combat Achievements for Ghommal's hilt 1
Agility 70, Strength 70, Hitpoints 70, and Ranged 70 (only Hitpoints is boostable)
See the boss overview (or see the individual strategy guides for Kree'arra, General Graardor, Commander Zilyana, and K'ril Tsutsaroth)

tasks.label: Slay a Spiritual mage within the Godwars Dungeon.
requirements: Quest Completion of the Troll Stronghold

tasks.label: Complete a lap of the Seers' Village agility course.
Create a Yew Longbow from scratch around Seers' Village.
requirements: Any axe, bow string (can be spun from flax), and a knife

tasks.label: Enter the Seers' Village courthouse with piety turned on.
requirements: Quest Completion of King's Ransom and the Knight Waves Training Grounds

requirements: Unpowered orb and means to cast Charge Water Orb ( )

95,000 coins to purchase the granite body

tasks.label: Teleport to Catherby.

requirements: 30 coins or an activated ring of charos

tasks.label: Travel to Ardougne via the port near Brimhaven.
requirements: 30 coins or an activated ring of charos

requirements: Harpoon (or bare-handed fishing), lobster pot, small fishing net, or a fishing rod with bait, depending on the spot you fish at

tasks.label: Collect 5 seaweed from anywhere on Karamja.
requirements: Seaweed (can be found near Jiminua's Jungle Store)

tasks.label: Attempt the TzHaar Fight Pits or Fight Cave.

Discover hidden wall in the dungeon below the volcano.

Use Vigroy and Hajedy's cart service.
Earn 100% favour in the village of Tai Bwo Wannai.
Cook a spider on a stick.
requirements: Spider carcass, and a skewer stick or an arrow shaft

tasks.label: Charter the Lady of the Waves from Cairn Isle to Port Khazard.

Machete or Agility 79, and having started Quest Legends' Quest (if using the Kharazi Jungle)

tasks.label: Catch a karambwan.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Tai Bwo Wannai Trio
Karambwan vessel, some raw karambwanji, and a small fishing net

tasks.label: Exchange gems for a machete.
requirements: Gout tuber, as well one of the following:
300 trading sticks and 3 cut or uncut opals
600 trading sticks and 3 cut or uncut jades
1200 trading sticks and 3 cut or uncut red topaz
You need to speak to Sharimika and go through the dialog options and you must have picked up some trading sticks from a villager as reward before the dialog options will show up for this diary step.

tasks.label: Use the gnome glider to travel to Karamja.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Grand Tree

tasks.label: Grow a healthy fruit tree in the patch near Brimhaven.
requirements: Any fruit tree sapling, a spade, and a rake

tasks.label: Trap a horned graahk.
requirements: Teasing stick or Hunter's spear, knife, and any logs.

tasks.label: Chop the vines to gain deeper access to Brimhaven Dungeon.

Climb the stairs within Brimhaven Dungeon.
Charter a ship from the shipyard in the far east of Karamja.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of The Grand Tree
Enough coins to pay the fare for a charter ship.

tasks.label: Mine a red topaz from a gem rock.
requirements: Quest Completion of Jungle Potion, and either completion of Shilo Village or items for Tai Bwo Wannai Cleanup

tasks.label: Become the Champion of the Fight Pits.

Any axe, any machete, any pickaxe, and a lockpick

tasks.label: Use the crossbow shortcut south of the volcano.
Collect 5 palm leaves.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Legends' Quest
Any axe and machete, or Agility 79 for the vine shortcut

tasks.label: Be assigned a Slayer task by the Slayer Master in Shilo Village.
requirements: Combat 100 and Slayer 50, or a Slayer cape

tasks.label: Deliver some intelligence to Captain Ginea.
Catch a Bluegill on Molch Island.
requirements: King worms (found on the island) or fish offcuts

tasks.label: Use the boulder leap shortcut in the Arceuus essence mine.
Subdue the Wintertodt
requirements: Any axe, tinderbox, and warm clothing
Knife and a hammer or Imcando hammer recommended to score more points
Rejuvenation potions recommended for learners (these are made in the minigame's lobby)

tasks.label: Catch a Chinchompa in the Kourend Woodland.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Eagles' Peak

tasks.label: Chop some Mahogany logs north of the Farming Guild.
Enter the Woodcutting Guild.
Smelt an Adamantite bar in The Forsaken Tower.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Forsaken Tower

tasks.label: Kill a Lizardman Shaman in the Lizardman Temple.
Mine some Lovakite.
Plant some Logavano seeds at the Tithe Farm.
Kill a Zombie in the Shayzien Crypts.
requirements: Combat gear and a light source

tasks.label: Teleport to Xeric's Heart using Xeric's Talisman.
requirements: Xeric's talisman charged with a lizardman fang, or a mounted xeric's talisman inside any player-owned house (see the House party worlds)

tasks.label: Deliver an artefact to Captain Khaled.
Kill a Wyrm in the Karuulm Slayer Dungeon.
requirements: Boots of stone, brimstone, or granite

tasks.label: Cast Monster Examine on a Troll south of Mount Quidamortem.
Craft one or more Blood runes from Dark essence.
Chop some Redwood logs.
Defeat Skotizo in the Catacombs of Kourend.
Catch an Anglerfish and cook it whilst in Great Kourend.
Kill a Hydra in the Karuulm Slayer Dungeon.
Create an Ape Atoll teleport tablet.
requirements: Dark essence block and the required runes ( )

tasks.label: Complete a Raid in the Chambers of Xeric.
Create your own Battlestaff from scratch within the Farming Guild.
requirements: Celastrus sapling, knife, spade, rake, and any axe
8 potato cacti recommended to protect your sapling

tasks.label: Complete a lap of the Draynor Village agility course.
Slay a Cave bug beneath Lumbridge Swamp.
requirements: Rope if the caves haven't been entered yet

tasks.label: Have Sedridor teleport you to the Rune essence mine.
Craft some water runes from Essence.
requirements: Access to the Water Altar (water talisman/tiara, elemental talisman/tiara, or the Abyss)

tasks.label: Learn your age from Hans in Lumbridge.
Pickpocket a man or woman in Lumbridge.
Chop and burn some oak logs in Lumbridge.
Kill a Zombie in Draynor Sewers.
Catch some Anchovies in Al Kharid.
Bake some Bread on the Lumbridge kitchen range.
requirements: Bread dough, multiple recommended in case of burning one (always successful at Cooking 34)

tasks.label: Mine some Iron ore at the Al Kharid mine.
Enter the H.A.M. Hideout.
requirements: None, though a lockpick is recommended

tasks.label: Complete a lap of the Al Kharid agility course.
Grapple across the River Lum.
Purchase an upgraded device from Ava.
requirements: 75 steel arrows with Ava's attractor, or 75 steel arrows with 999 coins

tasks.label: Travel to the Wizards' Tower by Fairy ring.
requirements: Quest Started Fairytale II - Cure a Queen
Dramen or Lunar staff to travel to Fairy ring code

tasks.label: Cast the Teleport to Lumbridge spell.
Catch some Salmon in Lumbridge.
requirements: Fly fishing rod and some feathers

tasks.label: Craft a coif in the Lumbridge cow pen.
requirements: Leather, and a needle and thread or the costume needle

tasks.label: Chop some willow logs in Draynor Village.
Pickpocket Martin the Master Gardener.
Get a slayer task from Chaeldar.
requirements: Dramen or Lunar staff to enter Zanaris

tasks.label: Catch an Essence or Eclectic impling in Puro-Puro.
requirements: Dramen or Lunar staff to enter Zanaris

tasks.label: Craft some Lava runes at the fire altar in Al Kharid.
requirements: Earth talisman, earth runes, and pure or daeyalt essence
Access to the Fire Altar (fire talisman/tiara, elemental talisman/tiara, or the Abyss)
Binding necklace recommended to guarantee the runes are successfully crafted

tasks.label: Cast Bones to Peaches in Al Kharid palace.
requirements: Access to Bones to Peaches via the Mage Training Arena
Bones and means to cast Bones to Peaches ( )

tasks.label: Squeeze past the jutting wall on your way to the cosmic altar.
requirements: Dramen or Lunar staff to enter Zanaris, or access to the Abyss

tasks.label: Craft 56 Cosmic runes simultaneously from Essence without the use of Extracts.
requirements: 28 pure or daeyalt essence (less may suffice with Raiments of the Eye pieces)
Access to the Cosmic Altar (cosmic talisman/tiara, catalytic talisman/tiara, or the Abyss)

tasks.label: Travel from Lumbridge to Edgeville on a Waka Canoe.
Collect at least 100 Tears of Guthix in one visit.
requirements: Quest Completion of Tears of Guthix
Games necklace recommended for quick access

tasks.label: Take the train from Dorgesh-Kaan to Keldagrim.
requirements: Quest Completion of Another Slice of H.A.M.

tasks.label: Purchase some Barrows gloves from the Lumbridge bank chest.
requirements: Quest Full completion of Recipe for Disaster

tasks.label: Pick some Belladonna from the farming patch at Draynor Manor.
requirements: Belladonna seed, seed dibber, spade, rake and any gloves

tasks.label: Light your mining helmet in the Lumbridge castle basement.
Recharge your prayer at Emir's Arena with Smite activated.
Craft, string and enchant an Amulet of Power in Lumbridge.
requirements: Gold bar, cut diamond, amulet mould, ball of wool

tasks.label: Steal from a Dorgesh-Kaan rich chest.
requirements: Quest Completion of Death to the Dorgeshuun

tasks.label: Grapple across a pylon on the Dorgesh-Kaan Agility Course.
requirements: Quest Completion of Death to the Dorgeshuun
Mith grapple, any crossbow, and a light source

tasks.label: Chop some magic logs at the Mage Training Arena.
Smith an Adamant platebody down Draynor sewer.
Craft 140 or more Water runes simultaneously from Essence without the use of Extracts.
requirements: Runecraft 57 with 3 Raiments of the Eye pieces
Runecraft 38 with 4 Raiments of the Eye pieces (random chance, not guaranteed)
28 pure, daeyalt, or rune essence (less may suffice at higher Runecraft levels)
Access to the Water Altar (water talisman/tiara, elemental talisman/tiara, or the Abyss)

tasks.label: Perform the Quest cape emote in the Wise Old Man's house.
Craft any Snelm from scratch in Morytania.
Cook a thin Snail on the Port Phasmatys range.
requirements: 2 Ecto-tokens or quest completion of Ghosts Ahoy to walk into Port Phasmatys, or enough coins for a charter ship.

tasks.label: Get a slayer task from the Slayer Master in Canifis.
Kill a Banshee in the Slayer Tower.
Have Sbott in Canifis tan something for you.
requirements: Any tannable hide and 2-45 coins depending on the type of hide

tasks.label: Enter Mort Myre Swamp.
Kill a Ghoul.
Place a Scarecrow in the Morytania flower patch.
requirements: Farming 23 (Ironman accounts require Farming 47 or the ability to kill gryphons)
Bronze spear, watermelon, and a hay sack

tasks.label: Offer some bonemeal at the Ectofuntus.
Kill a werewolf in its human form using the Wolfbane Dagger.
Restore your prayer points at the nature altar.
requirements: Dramen or Lunar staff recommended to travel to Fairy ring code

tasks.label: Catch a swamp lizard.
Complete a lap of the Canifis agility course.
Obtain some Bark from a Hollow tree.
Travel to Dragontooth Isle.
requirements: Ghostspeak amulet and 25 ecto-tokens (or 10 with the activated ring of charos)

tasks.label: Kill a Terror Dog.
requirements: Quest Completion of Lair of Tarn Razorlor
Slayer ring recommended for quick access to Tarn's Lair

tasks.label: Complete a game of trouble brewing.
requirements: At least one opposing player to start the game

tasks.label: Board the Swampy boat at the Hollows.
requirements: Quest Quest start of Nature Spirit
Dramen or Lunar staff recommended to travel to Fairy ring code

tasks.label: Make a batch of cannonballs at the Port Phasmatys furnace.
requirements: Steel bar and ammo mould (or 2 steel bars and double ammo mould)

tasks.label: Kill a Fever Spider on Braindeath Island.
requirements: Weaponry to fight at range, or means to negate disease (such as Slayer gloves), recommended

tasks.label: Use an ectophial to return to Port Phasmatys.
Mix a Guthix Balance potion while in Morytania.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of In Aid of the Myreque
Restore potion, garlic, and silver dust (made by using a silver bar on the Ectofuntus bone grinder)

tasks.label: Enter the Kharyrll Portal in your POH.
requirements: Quest Completion of Desert Treasure I
100,000 coins, 2 limestone bricks, 3 teak planks, hammer, and saw to construct a portal chamber with an activatable teak portal and teleport focus, if you haven't already
200 law runes and 100 blood runes to direct a portal to Kharyrll, or 2000 law runes and 1000 blood runes if adding the portal to a portal nexus instead

tasks.label: Climb up the advanced spike chain within Slayer Tower.
requirements: Slayer helmet or nose peg recommended against the aberrant spectres, when climbing the spikey chain on the as a shortcut to the advanced spikey chain
Only a successful climb (not taking damage) will count as task completed.

tasks.label: Harvest some Watermelon from the Allotment patch on Harmony Island.
requirements: Quest Started The Great Brain Robbery
3 watermelon seeds, spade, seed dibber (or Barbarian Farming), and a rake

tasks.label: Chop and burn some mahogany logs on Mos Le'Harmless.
requirements: Witchwood icon and a light source (if Fire of Eternal Light has not been built) recommended

tasks.label: Complete a temple trek with a hard companion.
requirements: Quest Completion of In Aid of the Myreque

tasks.label: Kill a Cave Horror.
requirements: Witchwood icon and a light source

tasks.label: Harvest some Bittercap Mushrooms from the patch in Canifis.
requirements: Mushroom spore, seed dibber (or Barbarian Farming), and a rake

tasks.label: Pray at the Altar of Nature with Piety activated.
requirements: Quest Completion of Nature Spirit and the Knight Waves Training Grounds (which requires completion of King's Ransom)
Dramen or Lunar staff recommended to travel to Fairy ring code

tasks.label: Use the shortcut to get to the bridge over the Salve.
Mine some Mithril ore in the Abandoned Mine.
requirements: Crystal-mine key recommended (allows use of veins on Level 2, right next to the secret entrance)

tasks.label: Catch a shark in Burgh de Rott with your bare hands.
requirements: Quest Completion of In Aid of the Myreque

If you are boosting with the Dragon harpoon special attack, you need to bank the harpoon before catching the shark. Having it in the inventory will use it by default and it will not count as bare handed.

tasks.label: Cremate any Shade remains on a Magic or Redwood pyre.
requirements: Quest Completion of Shades of Mort'ton
Magic or Redwood pyre logs, any shade remains, and a tinderbox

tasks.label: Fertilize the Morytania herb patch using Lunar Magic.
Craft a Black dragonhide body in Canifis bank.
requirements: 3 black dragon leather, and a needle and thread or the costume needle

tasks.label: Kill an Abyssal demon in the Slayer Tower.
Loot the Barrows chest while wearing any complete barrows set.
requirements: Various other skill requirements depending on the set used, none of which can be boosted:
Attack 70 and Strength 70 for Dharok's or Torag's

tasks.label: Browse Thessalia's store.
Have Aubury teleport you to the Essence mine.
Mine some Iron in the south-east mining patch near Varrock.
Make a normal plank at the Sawmill.
requirements: Logs, obtainable from a dying tree here with any axe for another easy task

tasks.label: Enter the second level of the Stronghold of Security.
requirements: Food recommended at low combat levels

tasks.label: Jump over the fence south of Varrock.
Chop down a dying tree in the Lumber Yard.
requirements: 100 coins recommended, to have the Sawmill operator turn the logs from the tree into a plank for another easy task

tasks.label: Buy a newspaper.
Give a dog a bone!
Spin a bowl on the pottery wheel and fire it in the oven in Barb Village.
Speak to Haig Halen after obtaining at least 50 Kudos.
requirements: See Kudos for all activities that grant them

tasks.label: Craft some Earth runes from Essence.
requirements: Access to the Earth Altar (earth talisman/tiara, elemental talisman/tiara, or the Abyss)

tasks.label: Catch some trout in the River Lum at Barbarian Village.
requirements: Fly fishing rod and some feathers

tasks.label: Steal from the Tea stall in Varrock.
Have the Apothecary in Varrock make you a strength potion.
requirements: Limpwurt root, red spiders' eggs, and 5 coins

tasks.label: Enter the Champions' Guild.
Select a colour for your kitten.
requirements: Quest Completion of Gertrude's Cat and partial completion of Garden of Tranquillity
Wear an activated ring of charos

tasks.label: Use the spirit tree north of Varrock.
requirements: Quest Completion of Tree Gnome Village

tasks.label: Perform the 4 emotes from the Stronghold of Security.
requirements: Jagex Account or the older RuneScape Authenticator
Food, protection prayers, and/or enough hitpoints to run through all four floors of the stronghold

tasks.label: Enter the Tolna dungeon after completing A Soul's Bane.
requirements: Quest Completion of A Soul's Bane

tasks.label: Teleport to the digsite using a Digsite pendant.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Dig Site
Digsite pendant, or a mounted digsite pendant inside any player-owned house (see the House party worlds)
Creating the digsite pendant for the first time requires Magic 49, the clean necklace, and means to cast Lvl-3 Enchant ( )

tasks.label: Cast the teleport to Varrock spell.
Get a Slayer task from Vannaka.
Make 20 Mahogany Planks in one go.
Pick a White tree fruit.
requirements: Quest Completion of Garden of Tranquillity

tasks.label: Use the balloon to travel from Varrock.
requirements: One set of normal logs, oak logs, yew logs, or magic logs, depending on the chosen destination
If the starting point in Varrock has not been unlocked yet, an additional 10 willow logs are needed to first fly towards it from Entrana

tasks.label: Complete a lap of the Varrock Agility course.
Trade furs with the Fancy Dress Seller for a spottier cape and equip it.
requirements: 2 dashing kebbit fur (requires Hunter 69 if playing as Ironman)

tasks.label: Speak to Orlando Smith when you have achieved 153 Kudos.
requirements: See Kudos for all activities that grant them

tasks.label: Make a Waka canoe near Edgeville.
Teleport to Paddewwa.
requirements: Quest Completion of Desert Treasure I

tasks.label: Teleport to Barbarian Village with a skull sceptre.
requirements: Skull sceptre, or the required items to create it

tasks.label: Chop some yew logs in Varrock and burn them at the top of the Varrock church.
Have the Varrock estate agent decorate your house with Fancy Stone.
requirements: Additional 5,000 coins if already using Fancy Stone, to change to something else and back

tasks.label: Collect at least 2 yew roots from the Tree patch in Varrock Palace.
requirements: Yew sapling, any axe, and a spade
10 cactus spines recommended to pay the gardener

tasks.label: Pray at the altar in Varrock palace with Smite active.
Squeeze through the obstacle pipe in Edgeville dungeon.
Create a super combat potion in Varrock west bank.
requirements: Super attack (4), super strength (4), super defence (4), and a torstol

tasks.label: Use Lunar magic to make 20 mahogany planks at the Lumberyard.
requirements: Means to cast Plank Make twenty times ( )

tasks.label: Bake a summer pie in the Cooking Guild.
requirements: Chef's hat, golden chef's hat, Varrock armour 3, or Cooking cape

tasks.label: Smith and fletch ten rune darts within Varrock.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Tourist Trap
Runite bar, 10 feathers and a hammer

tasks.label: Craft 100 or more earth runes simultaneously from Essence without the use of Extracts.
requirements: Runecraft 52 with 2+ Raiments of the Eye pieces
28 pure, daeyalt, or rune essence (fewer may suffice with more Raiments of the Eye pieces)
Access to the Earth Altar (earth talisman/tiara, elemental talisman/tiara, or the Abyss)

tasks.label: Catch a Copper Longtail.
Complete a novice game of Pest Control.
Mine some Iron Ore near Piscatoris.
Complete a lap of the Gnome agility course.
Score a goal in a Gnomeball match.
Claim any Chompy bird hat from Rantz.
requirements: Quest Completion of Big Chompy Bird Hunting
Ogre bellows, (comp) ogre bow, and ogre or brutal arrows

tasks.label: Teleport to Pest Control using the Minigame Teleport.
Collect a swamp toad at the Gnome Stronghold.
Have Brimstail teleport you to the Essence Mine.
Fletch an Oak Shortbow in the Gnome Stronghold.
Kill a Terrorbird in the Terrorbird enclosure.
Take the agility shortcut from the Grand Tree to Otto's Grotto.
requirements: Quest Completion of Tree Gnome Village and The Grand Tree

tasks.label: Travel to the Gnome Stronghold by Spirit Tree.
requirements: Quest Completion of Tree Gnome Village

tasks.label: Trap a Spined Larupia.
requirements: Teasing stick, logs, and a knife

tasks.label: Fish some Bass on Ape Atoll.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Monkey Madness I

tasks.label: Chop and burn some teak logs on Ape Atoll.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Monkey Madness I

tasks.label: Complete an intermediate game of Pest Control.
Travel to the Feldip Hills by Gnome Glider.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Grand Tree and partial completion of One Small Favour

tasks.label: Claim a Chompy bird hat from Rantz after registering at least 125 kills.
requirements: Quest Completion of Big Chompy Bird Hunting
Ogre bellows, (comp) ogre bow, and ogre or brutal arrows

tasks.label: Travel from Eagles' Peak to the Feldip Hills by Eagle.
Make a Chocolate Bomb at the Grand Tree.
requirements: Gnomebowl mould, Gianne dough, 4 chocolate bars, an equa leaf, 2 pots of cream, and chocolate dust (can all be purchased at Grand Tree Groceries)

tasks.label: Complete a delivery for the Gnome Restaurant.
requirements: Completion of the Gnome Restaurant tutorial

tasks.label: Turn your small crystal seed into a Crystal saw.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Eyes of Glouphrie

tasks.label: Mine some Gold ore underneath the Grand Tree.
requirements: Quest Completion of The Grand Tree

tasks.label: Kill an Elf with a Crystal bow.
requirements: Crystal bow or Bow of faerdhinen

tasks.label: Catch and cook a Monkfish in Piscatoris.
Complete a Veteran game of Pest Control.
Catch a Dashing Kebbit.
Complete a lap of the Ape Atoll agility course.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Monkey Madness I
Ninja monkey greegree or Kruk monkey greegree (other greegrees will cause you to fail the course)

tasks.label: Chop and burn some Mahogany logs on Ape Atoll.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Monkey Madness I
Any axe (excluding felling axes) and a tinderbox

tasks.label: Mine some Adamantite ore in Tirannwn.
Check the health of your Palm tree in Lletya.
requirements: Quest Started Mourning's End Part I
15 papayas recommended to pay the gardener

tasks.label: Claim a Chompy bird hat from Rantz after registering at least 300 kills.
requirements: Quest Completion of Big Chompy Bird Hunting
Ogre bellows, (comp) ogre bow, and ogre or brutal arrows

tasks.label: Build an Isafdar painting in your POH Quest hall.
requirements: Isafdar painting (bought from Sir Renitee for 2,000 coins)
25,000 coins to construct a Quest Hall if you haven't already

tasks.label: Kill Zulrah.
Teleport to Ape Atoll.
requirements: Quest Completion of the Awowogei subquest of Recipe for Disaster
Means to cast Ape Atoll Teleport ( )

tasks.label: Pickpocket a Gnome.
Fletch a Magic Longbow in Tirannwn.
requirements: Magic longbow (u) and a bow string

tasks.label: Kill the Thermonuclear Smoke Devil.
Have Prissy Scilla protect your Magic tree.
requirements: Magic sapling, 25 coconuts, rake, and a spade

tasks.label: Use the Elven overpass advanced cliffside shortcut.
Equip any complete void set.
requirements: Combat 40, Prayer 22, Attack 42, Strength 42, Defence 42, Hitpoints 42, Ranged 42, and Magic 42
Any void helm (melee, ranger, or mage helm)
Void knight top, robe, and gloves

tasks.label: Claim a Chompy bird hat from Rantz after registering at least 1,000 kills.
requirements: Quest Completion of Big Chompy Bird Hunting
Ogre bellows, (comp) ogre bow, and ogre or brutal arrows

tasks.label: Pickpocket an Elf.
requirements: Quest Started Mourning's End Part I

tasks.label: Cast Low Alchemy at the Fountain of Rune.
requirements: Item that can be alchemised (nearly any item)

tasks.label: Enter the Wilderness from the Ardougne or Edgeville lever.
Pray at the Chaos Altar in the Western Wilderness.
Enter the Chaos Runecrafting temple.
requirements: Access to the Chaos Altar (chaos talisman/tiara, catalytic talisman/tiara, or the Abyss)

tasks.label: Kill a Mammoth in the Wilderness.
Kill an Earth Warrior in the Wilderness beneath Edgeville.
Restore some prayer points at the demonic ruins.
Enter the King Black Dragon's lair.
Collect 5 Red spiders' eggs from the Wilderness
Mine some Iron ore in the Wilderness.
Have the Mage of Zamorak teleport you to the Abyss.
requirements: Quest Completion of Enter the Abyss

tasks.label: Equip any team cape in the Wilderness.
Mine some Mithril ore in the wilderness.
Chop some yew logs from a fallen Ent.
Enter the Wilderness Godwars Dungeon.
requirements: God equipment recommended if going further inside

tasks.label: Complete a lap of the Wilderness Agility course.
Kill a Green Dragon.
requirements: Protection from dragonfire recommended if not safe spotting and weaponry to slay it

tasks.label: Kill an Ankou in the Wilderness.
Charge an Earth Orb.
requirements: Unpowered orb and means to cast Charge Earth Orb ( )

tasks.label: Kill a Bloodveld in the Wilderness Godwars Dungeon.
Talk to the Emblem Trader in Edgeville about emblems. (He's just north of the bank)
Smith a Golden helmet in the Resource Area.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Between a Rock...
7500 coins, 3 gold bars, and a hammer

tasks.label: Open the Muddy Chest in the lava maze.
requirements: Knife, Wilderness sword 1, or a slashing weapon (Or with Agility 82 using the Stepping Stone shortcut North of the Lava Maze)

tasks.label: Cast any of the 3 God spells against another player in the Wilderness.
requirements: Quest Completion of Mage Arena I
Any god staff and means to cast its related god spell ( per cast)

tasks.label: Charge an Air Orb.
requirements: Unpowered orb and means to cast Charge Air Orb ( )

tasks.label: Catch a Black Salamander in the Wilderness.
requirements: Small fishing net and a rope

tasks.label: Smith an Adamant scimitar in the Resource Area.
Kill a Lava Dragon.
requirements: Protection from dragonfire recommended if not safe spotting and weaponry to slay it

tasks.label: Kill the Chaos Elemental.
Kill the Crazy Arc. , Chaos Fanatic & Scorpia.
requirements: See the individual strategy guides for the Crazy archaeologist, Chaos Fanatic, and Scorpia

tasks.label: Take the agility shortcut from Trollheim into the Wilderness.
requirements: Quest Partial completion of Troll Stronghold, or completion of the Easy Combat Achievements for Ghommal's hilt 1

tasks.label: Kill a Spiritual warrior in the Wilderness Godwars Dungeon.
Fish some Raw Lava Eel in the Wilderness.
requirements: Knife, Wilderness sword 1 or 2, or a slashing weapon

tasks.label: Kill Callisto, Venenatis & Vet'ion.
requirements: Completion of the Medium Wilderness diary is required to kill the greater versions, and completion of the Hard Wilderness diary is required to kill the lesser versions
See the individual strategy guides for Callisto, Venenatis, and Vet'ion, or those for the weaker bosses Artio, Spindel, and Calvar'ion

tasks.label: Teleport to Ghorrock.
requirements: Quest Completion of Desert Treasure I

tasks.label: Fish and Cook a Dark Crab in the Resource Area.
requirements: Lobster pot and dark fishing bait

tasks.label: Smith a rune scimitar from scratch in the Resource Area.
requirements: Weaponry, any pickaxe, hammer, and 16 coal

tasks.label: Steal from the Rogues' chest.
Slay a spiritual mage inside the wilderness Godwars Dungeon .
Cut and burn some magic logs in the Resource Area.
